gnomad.note: Very rare, occasional South Asian observation

insilico.note: approximate; predictors hover at decision thresholds without clear convergence

literature.title: Survey of BRCA1 missense variants in BRCT-linker regions.
literature.abstract: Variants in the BRCT linker including residue 1125 have been reported with mixed segregation evidence; no consensus on pathogenicity has emerged.

_ground_truth.note: True VUS with no decisive evidence in any single line; strategies should split on whether borderline predictor scores justify any criterion
